T0268.title: Comment-Enabled Account
T0268.definition: Kaipinghao refers to black-market account resources that possess commenting privileges and are specifically used to post fake reviews at scale.
T0268.description: These accounts typically bypass platform real-name verification or behavioral thresholds. They are used to mass-publish fake positive reviews, malicious negative reviews, or manipulative comments. In e-commerce brushing and public opinion manipulation, kaipinghao are core tools for executing astroturfing tasks, rapidly fabricating a reputation or attacking competitors.
